result.description: St. Lawrence is a Michelin-starred French-Canadian restaurant in Vancouver, BC. It was opened in June 2017 by Chef J-C Poirier and offers a marriage of classic French cuisine with the food identity and culture of Quebec. The restaurant has received positive reviews for its food, service, and atmosphere.
